title: Bean Blossom Light Poached Sprout Salad
description: A floral and light Nordic-inspired brunch dish featuring bean sprouts poached in a mild broth with seasonal vegetables for a refreshing gluten-free option.

ingredients.name: Lemon Vertices (optional)
ingredients.notes: fresh lemon leaves available in some regions, can be omitted if unavailable

instructions: Heat a small amount of water in a pot to just under boiling point.
Add the bean sprouts, celery leaves, optional lemon vertices, fresh dill, and walnuts to the simmering water. Cook for about 2-3 minutes or until the sprouts are tender but still crisp.
Drain and immediately rinse with cold water to stop the cooking process.
In a mixing bowl, whisk together the watermelon balsamic vinaigrette.
Gently fold in the cooled bean sprouts into the vinaigrette.
Serve chilled or at room temperature for best texture.
